description: Generate ArticleCard React component for ARES dashboard. Display article data from Firestore 'articles' collection. Include: title, author, tags, publishedAt (Firestore Timestamp), and error boundary. Use Tailwind dark theme (gray-800/700/600 palette). Make it consistent with ProjectCard styling.
requirements: Display: title, author, tags array, formatted date
Tailwind styling: dark theme, rounded-xl, hover effects
context: Reference ProjectCard.js for styling patterns and structure
